# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function generateAdminReport($pdo, $filters = []) {
    // Base query
    $sql = "SELECT 
                r.*,
                u.username,
                u.email,
                c.category_name,
                COUNT(DISTINCT ri.id) as item_count,
                SUM(ri.amount) as total_amount
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
            LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
            LEFT JOIN report_items ri ON r.id = ri.report_id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    $conditions = [];
    
    // Date range filter
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    // Status filter (can be single or multiple)
    if (!empty($filters['status'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['status'])) {
            $statusPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['status'] as $index => $status) {
                $key = ":status_{$index}";
                $statusPlaceholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $status;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.status IN (" . implode(',', $statusPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.status = :status";
            $params[':status'] = $filters['status'];
        }
    }
    
    // Category filter (can be single or multiple)
    if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
                $key = ":category_{$index}";
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $category;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.category_id IN (" . implode(',', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.category_id = :category";
            $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
        }
    }
    
    // User filter
    if (!empty($filters['user_id'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.user_id = :user_id";
        $params[':user_id'] = $filters['user_id'];
    }
    
    // Search filter (searches in title and description)
    if (!empty($filters['search'])) {
        $conditions[] = "(r.title LIKE :search OR r.description LIKE :search)";
        $params[':search'] = '%' . $filters['search'] . '%';
    }
    
    // Amount range filter
    if (!empty($filters['amount_min'])) {
        $conditions[] = "ri.amount >= :amount_min";
        $params[':amount_min'] = $filters['amount_min'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['amount_max'])) {
        $conditions[] = "ri.amount <= :amount_max";
        $params[':amount_max'] = $filters['amount_max'];
    }
    
    // Priority filter
    if (!empty($filters['priority'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['priority'])) {
            $priorityPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['priority'] as $index => $priority) {
                $key = ":priority_{$index}";
                $priorityPlaceholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $priority;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.priority IN (" . implode(',', $priorityPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.priority = :priority";
            $params[':priority'] = $filters['priority'];
        }
    }
    
    // Assigned to filter
    if (!empty($filters['assigned_to'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.assigned_to = :assigned_to";
        $params[':assigned_to'] = $filters['assigned_to'];
    }
    
    // Department filter
    if (!empty($filters['department'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['department'])) {
            $deptPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['department'] as $index => $dept) {
                $key = ":dept_{$index}";
                $deptPlaceholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $dept;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.department_id IN (" . implode(',', $deptPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.department_id = :department";
            $params[':department'] = $filters['department'];
        }
    }
    
    // Build final query
    if (!empty($conditions)) {
        $sql .= " AND " . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
    }
    
    $sql .= " GROUP BY r.id";
    
    // Order by
    $allowedOrderColumns = ['created_at', 'updated_at', 'title', 'status', 'total_amount', 'priority'];
    $orderBy = 'r.created_at';
    $orderDir = 'DESC';
    
    if (!empty($filters['order_by']) && in_array($filters['order_by'], $allowedOrderColumns)) {
        $orderBy = $filters['order_by'] === 'total_amount' ? 'total_amount' : 'r.' . $filters['order_by'];
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['order_dir']) && in_array(strtoupper($filters['order_dir']), ['ASC', 'DESC'])) {
        $orderDir = strtoupper($filters['order_dir']);
    }
    
    $sql .= " ORDER BY {$orderBy} {$orderDir}";
    
    // Pagination
    $limit = !empty($filters['limit']) && is_numeric($filters['limit']) ? (int)$filters['limit'] : 50;
    $offset = !empty($filters['offset']) && is_numeric($filters['offset']) ? (int)$filters['offset'] : 0;
    
    $sql .= " LIMIT :limit OFFSET :offset";
    $params[':limit'] = $limit;
    $params[':offset'] = $offset;
    
    // Execute query
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    
    // Bind parameters with proper types
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        if ($key === ':limit' || $key === ':offset') {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value, PDO::PARAM_INT);
        } else {
            $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
        }
    }
    
    $stmt->execute();
    $results = $stmt->fetchAll(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
    
    // Get total count for pagination
    $countSql = "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as total
                 FROM reports r
                 LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id
                 LEFT JOIN categories c ON r.category_id = c.id
                 LEFT JOIN report_items ri ON r.id = ri.report_id
                 WHERE 1=1";
    
    if (!empty($conditions)) {
        $countSql .= " AND " . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
    }
    
    $countStmt = $pdo->prepare($countSql);
    
    // Bind parameters for count query (exclude limit and offset)
    $countParams = $params;
    unset($countParams[':limit']);
    unset($countParams[':offset']);
    
    foreach ($countParams as $key => $value) {
        $countStmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    
    $countStmt->execute();
    $totalCount = $countStmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC)['total'];
    
    return [
        'data' => $results,
        'total' => $totalCount,
        'limit' => $limit,
        'offset' => $offset,
        'filters_applied' => $filters
    ];
}

function getSummaryStatistics($pdo, $filters = []) {
    $sql = "SELECT 
                COUNT(DISTINCT r.id) as total_reports,
                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.status = 'pending' THEN r.id END) as pending_count,
                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.status = 'completed' THEN r.id END) as completed_count,
                COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN r.status = 'in_progress' THEN r.id END) as in_progress_count,
                SUM(ri.amount) as total_amount,
                AVG(ri.amount) as average_amount,
                COUNT(DISTINCT r.category_id) as total_categories,
                COUNT(DISTINCT r.user_id) as total_users
            FROM reports r
            LEFT JOIN report_items ri ON r.id = ri.report_id
            WHERE 1=1";
    
    $params = [];
    $conditions = [];
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_from'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at >= :date_from";
        $params[':date_from'] = $filters['date_from'] . ' 00:00:00';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['date_to'])) {
        $conditions[] = "r.created_at <= :date_to";
        $params[':date_to'] = $filters['date_to'] . ' 23:59:59';
    }
    
    if (!empty($filters['category'])) {
        if (is_array($filters['category'])) {
            $categoryPlaceholders = [];
            foreach ($filters['category'] as $index => $category) {
                $key = ":category_{$index}";
                $categoryPlaceholders[] = $key;
                $params[$key] = $category;
            }
            $conditions[] = "r.category_id IN (" . implode(',', $categoryPlaceholders) . ")";
        } else {
            $conditions[] = "r.category_id = :category";
            $params[':category'] = $filters['category'];
        }
    }
    
    if (!empty($conditions)) {
        $sql .= " AND " . implode(' AND ', $conditions);
    }
    
    $stmt = $pdo->prepare($sql);
    foreach ($params as $key => $value) {
        $stmt->bindValue($key, $value);
    }
    $stmt->execute();
    
    return $stmt->fetch(PDO::FETCH_ASSOC);
}

// Usage example with $_POST
$filters = [
    'date_from' => $_POST['date_from'] ?? null,
    'date_to' => $_POST['date_to'] ?? null,
    'status' => $_POST['status'] ?? null,
    'category' => $_POST['category'] ?? null,
    'user_id' => $_POST['user_id'] ?? null,
    'search' => $_POST['search'] ?? null,
    'amount_min' => $_POST['amount_min'] ?? null,
    'amount_max' => $_POST['amount_max'] ?? null,
    'priority' => $_POST['priority'] ?? null,
    'assigned_to' => $_POST['assigned_to'] ?? null,
    'department' => $_POST['department'] ?? null,
    'order_by' => $_POST['order_by'] ?? 'created_at',
    'order_dir' => $_POST['order_dir'] ?? 'DESC',
    'limit' => $_POST['limit'] ?? 50,
    'offset' => $_POST['offset'] ?? 0
];

$filters = array_filter($filters, function($value) {
    return $value !== null && $value !== '';
});

try {
    $pdo = new PDO('mysql:host=localhost;dbname=your_database;charset=utf8mb4', 'username', 'password', [
        PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE => PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION,
        PDO::ATTR_DEFAULT_FETCH_MODE => PDO::FETCH_ASSOC,
        PDO::ATTR_EMULATE_PREPARES => false
    ]);
    
    $report = generateAdminReport($pdo, $filters);
    $statistics = getSummaryStatistics($pdo, $filters);
    
} catch (PDOException $e) {
    error_log("Database error: " . $e->getMessage());
    die("An error occurred while generating the report.");
}

?>
